title: MAQIHAN 100 Food Covers Plastic Stretch - Large Reusable Fresh Keeping Bags/100pcs Plate Cover Food Fresher for Longer Bags Bowl Covers Plastic Wrap Storage Bag for Sourdough Bread Proofing Making
features: Elastic Bowl Covers:The edge of the plastic food cover is a stretchable elastic cord, which makes the bowl cover very easy to use. You only need to stretch it along both ends of the bowl cover, and then it can easily cover dishes of different sizes. The elastic cord fits closely with the edge of the dish, protecting the food in the dish
Thick and Not Easy to Tear: These cover is made of high-quality plastic material, thick and not easy to tear Washable and reusable if not severely stained

Keep Away from Dust & Visibility: The cover effectively prevent dust and other things from contacting the food, especially suitable for use at yard parties and picnics. Compared with the traditional cloth bowl cover, the transparent MAQIHAN elastic plastic bowl covers makes it easy to identify the food in the bowl and take it

Keep Food Fresh: Use the reusable fresh keeping bags with the refrigerator to better keep food fresh and extend the storage time. The elastic food storage covers can prevent dust and water droplets from contacting the food and destroying the flavor of the food; It can also prevent the strong flavor of some products from spreading and affecting other foods in the refrigerator

Bowl Covers for Bread Proofing: Using bread bowl covers can help keeping the moisture of the dough in the bowl, prevent the dough from drying out during the proofing process, and create the best environment for the dough to ferment
description: Product Description 100Pcs Reusable Bowl Covers - Keep Food Fresh Applicable: 1. Keep food away from dust:The cover caneffectively prevents dust and other materials from entering the food 2. Food preservation:Use the reusable fresh keeping bags with the refrigerator to better keep food fresh and extend the storage time. 3. Bowl covers for bread proofing:The plastic wraps cover the container during the dough proofing process, creating optimal fermentation conditions. Product Name:Plastic Food Covers Brand:MAQIHAN Material:Plastic Size:35CM in diameter Quantity:100PCS Fits various sizes of bowls and plates Covers a mixing bowl no larger than 35CM. Dimensions are measured on the empty bowl. If the volume of food in the bowl is higher than the bowl, the applicable size will be reduced accordingly. Thick&Sturdy Compared with ordinary bowl covers, the thickness is 12μm, which is thick and not easy to tear. The bowl cover can be washed and reused, which is more economical. Flexible elasticity The elastic cord not only allows the reusable plastic wrap to cover bowls of different sizes, but also allows the food cover to fit firmly around the bowl to prevent dust from entering.Please stretch gently when using to avoid damage.
